item.title: Boy arrested for attempted murder after two pupils stabbed at school
item.description: Counter-terror officers are leading the investigation after two boys were left seriously injured.

item.title: Has Keir Starmer Saved His Job (For Now)?
item.description: Keir Starmer survives his ‘moment of peril’ but what has it cost him and his government?

item.title: Ex-police chief said Trump told him in 2006 'everyone' knew of Epstein's behaviour
item.description: The now-president allegedly called police in Florida who were investigating Epstein and said "thank goodness you're stopping him".

item.title: Noel Clarke arrested on suspicion of attempted rape, reports say
item.description: The Doctor Who star was also held on suspicion of exposure and sexual assault by touching, the Sun reported.

item.title: Under-fire Trump commerce secretary confirms he visited Epstein's island
item.description: Howard Lutnick says he had lunch on the island in 2012, contradicting previous claims he had cut ties with Jeffrey Epstein in 2005.
